title: Classic Improvements ADD-ON 5 Fancy Netherite
description: This Add-on makes Netherite armor and tools fancy
body:
# Classic Improvements ADD-ON 5

### If your looking for CIMS [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classicimprovements)  

#

+ This changes all Netherite stuff except the block 

Also why not have some cooler armor and tools

## NOTES

This doesn't require any mods 

Recommended to use this with CIMS 

THIS GO'S ABOVE ALL ADD-ONS UP INTILL ADD-ON 4
